name: mojo-multichannel-conv2d-backward-tests
description: Pattern for testing multi-channel Conv2D backward passes in Mojo with analytically tractable gradient verification. Use when: (1) adding backward pass tests for conv layers with in_channels>1 or out_channels>1, (2) verifying grad_input/grad_weights/grad_bias shapes and values for multi-channel configurations, (3) extending single-channel backward tests to multi-channel coverage.
